questions.question: What is the primary reason for varying the bandwidth in a computer network?
questions.hint: Existing bandwidth may not be sufficient for a particular application

questions.question: An application with a low bandwidth requirement is connected to the network using a point-to-point link with a bandwidth of 100 Mbps. A large file is being transferred to the application. What will happen to the transfer rate due to the varying bandwidth?
questions.hint: The transfer rate will be limited by the lowest bandwidth link in the path

questions.question: Explain the concept of bandwidth aggregation, and how can it be applied to improve the overall bandwidth of a network?
questions.hint: Consider the use of multiple links, switches, and routers to aggregate available bandwidth
